variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The selected COGS reference bucket is the single 'Cost of sales' row, and the visible D&A rows appear as separate operating-expense lines rather than COGS-labelled components. Conservatively leave COGS_DA empty to avoid misallocating group-level operating D&A into COGS.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A summary line at the same level as the selected SG&A component rows ('Salaries and other payroll costs', 'Stock-based Compensation in SGA', 'Other Operating Expenses'). It appears outside those selected rows, so it should be added separately to the SG&A-side bucket. Prefer this summary over its components to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is assembled from overhead rows and does not include any explicit D&A row. 'Depreciation and Write-down' appears as a separate operating line above EBIT and above financial items, alongside rather than inside the selected SG&A component rows. Per the same-level separate-line rule, it should be added separately. The summary row is preferred over individual depreciation/amortization components to avoid double counting.
